82 G1AB G1AB_SUPP_BED 23aB(G1aB)Bed Mobility - Support Provided CHAR 1 Indicates how the patient with support provided moves to and from a lying position, turns side to side, and positions body while in bed. -1 = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person
